Így azok az emberek, akik általános egészségükről és vitalitásukról szeretnének gondoskodni, a Q10 koenzim bevitelére összpontosítanak. items.raw_desc: Távcső fényszűrő Levenhuk F2 „Hold és Mars” szűrőkészlet:The Levenhuk F2 "Moon and Mars" filter set is compatible with the stargazing telescope. It contains 2 filters, one for studying the surface of the Moon and the other for observing Mars, Jupiter and Saturn. They effectively increase the image contrast and allow more detailed observation of astronomical phenomena. They have a 1.25" diameter tube. The optical red filter has a low light transmission, making it effective for stargazing telescopes with apertures of 150 mm or larger. It offers detailed observations of the polar caps, dust clouds, the Martian sea and the blue clouds of Saturn and Jupiter. The lunar filter for lunar observation reduces the brightness, allowing you to examine the lunar surface in more detail. Its use is ideal when the moon phase is greater than 80% and during the full moon. Works with stargazing telescopes of any aperture. It doesn't strain the eyes.
